agents.name: Debt Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze debt portfolio and calculate payoff strategies
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze all debts: balances, interest rates, minimum payments, and terms. Calculate both avalanche (highest interest first) and snowball (smallest balance first) strategies. Compare total interest paid and payoff timelines.

agents.name: Payoff Planner
agents.purpose: Create a detailed debt payoff plan
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a debt payoff plan with: debt inventory table, avalanche vs snowball comparison, recommended strategy with reasoning, month-by-month payment schedule, total interest saved, debt-free date, and motivational milestones. Include extra payment impact calculator.

suggestion_card.title: Debt Payoff
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create debt payoff strategies
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Plan to pay off: [list debts with balances and rates]
